_note: Golden values for the hermetic E2E. Run-Hermetic.ps1 only asserts the structural invariants captured here (not a byte-exact diff), because the correlation engine output contains a generatedAt timestamp and PSCustomObject ordering may vary. The chaosAttributedCount is the expected number of chaos-attributed signals after correlating recorded-metrics.json (which has a CPU drop from ~65% to ~13% inside the action window) against the action's resource and the Percentage CPU threshold of 20 from templates/metrics/defaults.json.
